learnings.claim: String enum types in Go should follow the PlanGranularity pattern: type alias + constants + Valid() method + ErrInvalid* sentinel
learnings.evidence: ParallelMode type implemented following PlanGranularity pattern, all tests pass

learnings.claim: CLI get/set subcommands should follow the colony-depth pattern: nil store guard, LoadJSON with default fallback, set validates and persists
learnings.evidence: parallel-mode get/set implemented following colony-depth pattern, 8 tests pass, Probe and Watcher verified

learnings.claim: JSON template files should include _comment_ prefixed fields to document new configuration options, following the existing field documentation pattern
learnings.evidence: Both colony-state templates updated with _comment_parallel_mode and parallel_mode fields, validated by Probe and Watcher

learnings.claim: Cross-platform init changes should follow the same step structure in both Claude Code and OpenCode init.md files, with state-mutate for persisting user choices after template write
learnings.evidence: Both init.md files updated with identical Step 6.5, state-mutate calls in both re-init and fresh paths, and Step 8 display. Probe and Watcher verified.

learnings.claim: Build-wave conditional steps should read parallel_mode and branch cleanly: skip with empty allocations for in-repo, allocate per-worker for worktree, with graceful fallback on allocation failure
learnings.evidence: Step 5.0.7 in build-wave.md implements conditional worktree allocation, all tests pass, Watcher verified

learnings.claim: Context injection into colony-prime should read parallel_mode from state with a default fallback to in-repo, matching the parallel-mode get subcommand pattern
learnings.evidence: Parallel mode injected into colony-prime at pheromone_mgmt.go:164-168, defaults to ModeInRepo when empty, 2 tests pass, Watcher verified 1167 tests pass

learnings.claim: Display commands (status, resume) should read parallel_mode from colony state with in-repo default fallback, following the same pattern as colony-depth and plan-granularity displays
learnings.evidence: Parallel mode displayed in status.go, context.go resume-dashboard, and both Claude Code and OpenCode command files. 4 tests pass covering default and explicit modes.
